name: RPlog_Angry_Rancor_Deal_Pt_I
title: Angry Rancor Deal (Part I)
summary: Aboard the cruise vessel Angry Rancor, in orbit over Tatooine amid a buzz of swoop-race tourism, Commander Imriel of the Imperial Task Force Inquisitor arrives with two aides to meet Inanna Jordain. The two exchange firm handshakes and pleasantries before settling into a restaurant aboard the ship, weapons openly worn as the relaxed etiquette allows. Imriel lays out a proposal on behalf of the Empire, stressing assurances that no military operations will be conducted, while Inanna listens attentively and weighs every word. One of Imriel's lieutenants interjects with a request, and Inanna fields the exchange before signaling her growing understanding of the arrangement. She bows respectfully, expresses gladness to be of service, and the parties agree to remain aboard to sort out the particulars, closing the first stage of the deal on cordial terms.
